svg.title: GitHub and the software development lifecycle
svg.desc: Diagram showing GitHub at the center, with integrations across planning, CI/CD, testing, security, deployment, and monitoring stages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What events can trigger GitHub integrations?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub integrate with project planning tools like Jira?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub connect to CI/CD pipelines?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub integrate with code quality and review tools?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub handle security scanning and vulnerability detection?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub send notifications to Slack or Teams?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub connect to cloud deployment platforms?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub connect to monitoring and observability tools?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Packages and artifact storage work?')
